name: Mid-Atlantic States Air Pollution Control Compact

sections.heading: Secs. 22a-166 and 22a-167. (Formerly Secs. 19-523 and 19-524). Compact. Any court of competent jurisdiction defined.

body: Sections 22a-166 and 22a-167 are repealed, effective October 1, 2013.
content.plainText: Sections 22a-166 and 22a-167 are repealed, effective October 1, 2013.
